member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowMilestone
member.summary: Represents a milestone within a . Milestones group instances and mark significant delivery points.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowMilestone.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of this milestone.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowMilestone.Name
member.summary: Gets the display name of the milestone.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowMilestone.ProjectId
member.summary: Gets the project this milestone belongs to.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowMilestone.TargetDate
member.summary: Gets the optional target completion date of the milestone.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowMilestone.Status
member.summary: Gets the current status of the milestone (e.g. "Open", "Completed").

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowMilestone.TenantId
member.summary: Gets the tenant that owns this milestone.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowMilestone.Phase
member.summary: Gets the current workflow phase of this milestone.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowMilestone.Create(System.String,System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Creates a new with the given name and project.
member.param: The display name of the milestone. Must not be null or whitespace.
The project this milestone belongs to.
The tenant that owns this milestone.
member.returns: A new instance with status "Open" and phase Discovery.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowMilestone.Complete
member.summary: Transitions this milestone to the "Completed" status and the phase.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowMilestone.UpdateTargetDate(System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: Updates the target completion date of this milestone.
member.param: The new target date, or null to clear it.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProgram
member.summary: Represents a high-level program that groups related instances. A program is the top-level container in the FlowManagement hierarchy.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProgram.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of this program.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProgram.Name
member.summary: Gets the display name of the program.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProgram.TenantId
member.summary: Gets the tenant that owns this program.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProgram.Description
member.summary: Gets an optional description of the program.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProgram.Phase
member.summary: Gets the current workflow phase of this program.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProgram.Create(System.String,System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new with the given name and tenant.
member.param: The display name of the program. Must not be null or whitespace.
The tenant that owns this program.
An optional description of the program.
member.returns: A new instance with phase Discovery.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or whitespace.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProject
member.summary: Represents a project within a . Projects group related and instances.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProject.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of this project.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProject.Name
member.summary: Gets the display name of the project.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProject.ProgramId
member.summary: Gets the optional program this project belongs to.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProject.Description
member.summary: Gets an optional description of the project.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProject.StartDate
member.summary: Gets the optional planned start date of the project.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProject.EndDate
member.summary: Gets the optional planned end date of the project.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProject.TenantId
member.summary: Gets the tenant that owns this project.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProject.Phase
member.summary: Gets the current workflow phase of this project.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProject.Create(System.String,System.Guid,System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Creates a new with the given name and tenant.
member.param: The display name of the project. Must not be null or whitespace.
The tenant that owns this project.
An optional program to assign this project to.
member.returns: A new instance with phase Discovery.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProject.UpdateDates(System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: Updates the planned start and end dates of this project.
member.param: The new start date, or null to clear it.
The new end date, or null to clear it.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask
member.summary: Represents an individual work item within the FlowManagement module. is a UUID-only reference to a Kernel FlowEpic — no foreign key is maintained across the module boundary.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of this task.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.EpicKernelId
member.summary: Gets the UUID of the Kernel FlowEpic this task is associated with. This is a UUID-only link — no foreign key constraint is enforced across the module boundary.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.MilestoneId
member.summary: Gets the optional milestone this task is grouped under.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.Name
member.summary: Gets the display name of the task.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.Description
member.summary: Gets an optional description of the task.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.AssigneeId
member.summary: Gets the optional user assigned to this task.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.Status
member.summary: Gets the current status of the task (e.g. "Open", "Completed").

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.DueDate
member.summary: Gets the optional due date of the task.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.TenantId
member.summary: Gets the tenant that owns this task.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.Phase
member.summary: Gets the current workflow phase of this task.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.IsSyncedToKernel
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this task has been successfully synchronised with the Kernel at least once.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.LastSyncAt
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp of the most recent successful sync, or null if the task has never been synchronised.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.Create(System.Guid,System.String,System.Guid,System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Creates a new linked to the given Kernel epic.
member.param: The UUID of the Kernel FlowEpic. UUID-only — no FK.
The display name of the task. Must not be null or whitespace.
The tenant that owns this task.
An optional milestone to group this task under.
member.returns: A new instance with status "Open" and phase Discovery.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.Complete
member.summary: Transitions this task to the "Completed" status and the phase.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.Reopen
member.summary: Transitions this task back to the "Open" status and the phase. Can only be called when the current status is "Completed".
member.exception: Thrown when the task is not in "Completed" status.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.Assign(System.Guid)
member.summary: Assigns this task to the specified user.
member.param: The identifier of the user to assign this task to.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask.MarkSynced(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Records a successful synchronisation with the Kernel.
member.param: The UTC timestamp of the sync event.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowMilestoneRepository
member.summary: Repository contract for persistence.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowMilestoneRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a by its identifier, or null if not found.
member.param: The unique identifier of the milestone.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowMilestoneRepository.AddAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowMilestone,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists a new to the store.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowMilestoneRepository.UpdateAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowMilestone,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists changes to an existing .

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowMilestoneRepository.ListByProjectAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all milestones belonging to the given project.
member.returns: A list of milestones belonging to the project.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowProgramRepository
member.summary: Repository contract for persistence.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowProgramRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a by its identifier, or null if not found.
member.param: The unique identifier of the program.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowProgramRepository.AddAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProgram,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists a new to the store.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowProgramRepository.UpdateAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProgram,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists changes to an existing .

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowProgramRepository.ListByTenantAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all programs owned by the given tenant.
member.returns: A list of programs belonging to the tenant.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowProjectRepository
member.summary: Repository contract for persistence.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowProjectRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a by its identifier, or null if not found.
member.param: The unique identifier of the project.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowProjectRepository.AddAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProject,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists a new to the store.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowProjectRepository.UpdateAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowProject,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists changes to an existing .

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowProjectRepository.ListByProgramAsync(System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all projects optionally scoped to the given program. Pass null to retrieve projects not assigned to any program.
member.param: The identifier of the program to filter by, or null for unassigned projects.
member.returns: A list of projects matching the filter.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowTaskRepository
member.summary: Repository contract for persistence.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowTaskRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a by its identifier, or null if not found.
member.param: The unique identifier of the task.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowTaskRepository.AddAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists a new to the store.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowTaskRepository.UpdateAsync(SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.FlowTask,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists changes to an existing .

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.Interfaces.IFlowTaskRepository.ListByEpicAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all tasks associated with the given Kernel epic identifier.
member.param: The UUID of the Kernel FlowEpic.
member.returns: A list of tasks belonging to the epic.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.OfflineSyncQueueItem
member.summary: Represents a queued offline sync operation awaiting ingestion by the Kernel. Items expire after 30 days. The (TenantId, ClientSignalId) pair is unique to prevent duplicate processing of the same client-generated signal.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.OfflineSyncQueueItem.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of this queue item.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.OfflineSyncQueueItem.TenantId
member.summary: Gets the tenant that owns this queue item.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.OfflineSyncQueueItem.Payload
member.summary: Gets the serialised payload of the queued operation.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.OfflineSyncQueueItem.ClientSignalId
member.summary: Gets the client-generated idempotency key. Combined with , this must be unique in the queue.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.OfflineSyncQueueItem.ExpiresAt
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp after which this item may be purged.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.OfflineSyncQueueItem.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp when this item was created.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Domain.OfflineSyncQueueItem.Create(System.Guid,System.String,System.Guid)
member.summary: Creates a new that expires 30 days from now.
member.param: The tenant that owns this queue item.
The serialised payload. Must not be null or whitespace.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or whitespace.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.Configurations.FlowMilestoneConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core entity type configuration for .

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.Configurations.FlowProgramConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core entity type configuration for .

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.Configurations.FlowProjectConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core entity type configuration for .

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.Configurations.FlowTaskConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core entity type configuration for .

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.Configurations.OfflineSyncQueueItemConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core entity type configuration for .

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.ModulesDbContext
member.summary: EF Core database context for the FlowManagement module. On PostgreSQL, all tables are placed in the modules schema. On SQLite (development / tests), schema is not supported and is omitted.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.ModulesDbContext.FlowTasks
member.summary: Gets the entities.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.ModulesDbContext.FlowMilestones
member.summary: Gets the entities.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.ModulesDbContext.FlowProjects
member.summary: Gets the entities.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.ModulesDbContext.FlowPrograms
member.summary: Gets the entities.

member.name: P:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.ModulesDbContext.OfflineSyncQueue
member.summary: Gets the entities.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.ModulesDbContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions{SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.ModulesDbContext})
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of with the given options.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Services.FlowNodeResolver
member.summary: Resolves the level and identity of a flow node by searching all node collections in the FlowManagement hierarchy (Task → Milestone → Project → Program).

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Services.FlowNodeResolver.#ctor(SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.ModulesDbContext)
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of .

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Services.FlowNodeResolver.ResolveAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves the level and identifier of a flow node with the given . Searches FlowTasks, then FlowMilestones, then FlowProjects, then FlowPrograms.
member.returns: A tuple of (Level, Id) where Level is one of "Task", "Milestone", "Project", "Program"; or null if no matching node is found.

member.name: T:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Services.OfflineQueueService
member.summary: Manages the offline sync queue for the FlowManagement module. Queue items represent pending operations that must be delivered to the Kernel.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Services.OfflineQueueService.#ctor(SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Infrastructure.ModulesDbContext)
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of .

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Services.OfflineQueueService.EnqueueAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new queue item with the given payload and persists it.
member.param: The tenant that owns this queue item.
The serialised operation payload. Must not be null or whitespace.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Services.OfflineQueueService.GetPendingAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a batch of non-expired queue items ordered by creation time (oldest first).
member.param: The maximum number of items to return.
member.returns: A read-only list of pending queue items.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Services.OfflineQueueService.RemoveAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes a queue item by its identifier. No-ops silently if the item no longer exists.
member.param: The identifier of the queue item to remove.

member.name: M:SpaceOS.Modules.FlowManagement.Services.OfflineQueueService.GetBackoffDelay(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates the exponential back-off delay for a retry attempt. The delay is capped at 60 seconds: min(2^retryCount, 60) seconds.
member.returns: The back-off delay to wait before the next attempt.
